vibe: Cross between flight simulator, neuroscience lab, and premium SaaS. High-stakes, precise, clinical but premium, tactical.

typography.fonts_to_import: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono

data_mono.style: Used for all metrics, scores, timers, and live data feeds

labels.style: Uppercase, tiny text-xs, wide spacing tracking-[0.2em]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8 internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: tight (gap-4 or gap-6). Use h-full to stretch children.
spacing_and_layout.corners: Tactical Minimalism: max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). Avoid heavy pills.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and dense content. Use asymmetrical grids.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid subtle border (border-white/10), NO shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and border color darkens.
surface_strategies.floating_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 with border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.simulation_view: Retro-Futurism/Terminal look for biometric feeds: Deep black background, high-contrast neon accents, subtle drop-shadow on metrics.
surface_strategies.video_overlay: Max overlay opacity: bg-black/50 to let the background breathe.

components.buttons: Minimal radius, high contrast focus states. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#3395FF] hover:text-white).
components.charts: Recharts library. Inverted axes, monochromatic grid lines, use primary/accents for data.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI base. Strip Verel-look. Darker backgrounds, 1px borders, intense focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF]).
components.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a descriptive data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

motion.interactions: Micro-interactions for feedback. Fast, snappy transitions (0.15s ease) suited for a command center.
motion.page_transitions: Staggered entrances for metrics and widgets. Use framer-motion.

icons.usage: Use for dense dashboard and tech feel, mostly Duotone or Regular weights.

image_urls.description: Professional mock interview scene for landing or onboarding sections.
Immersive dark VR office simulation background for the interview environment.
Abstract neural nodes background for cognitive load and stress tracker modules.
Tactical control panel imagery for the biometric and analytics sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Dark Theme and Archetype 2 (Performance Pro). NO purple or teal green/blue gradients allowed.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Use Outfit (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body), and JetBrains Mono (Data/Scores).
Build the dashboard using pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout using the 'Control Room Grid' rules.
For the VR Simulation view, treat it like a flight simulator / HUD: use absolute positioning for floating metrics, glass overlays, and fixed biometric panels.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG standards. Never use pure #000000; use #0A0A0A for background.
Implement the multi-language switcher prominently in the main navigation.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrapper for creative layouts; use pure HTML `div` with our specified surface strategy.
Use Recharts for Knowledge Heatmaps and Biometric Stress tracking visualizations.
